info.name: Workday Integration Workday Benefits Administration API
Workday Integration Retrieve benefit plans for a worker

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: Zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns the benefit plan enrollments for the specified worker.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve benefit elections for a worker

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: Zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns the current benefit elections for the specified worker including coverage levels and dependents.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve dependents for a worker

params.name: ID
params.description: The Workday ID of the resource

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: Zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns the dependents and beneficiaries for the specified worker.

info.name: Workday Integration Retrieve benefit plan types

params.name: limit
params.description: Maximum number of objects in a single response (default 20, maximum 100)

params.name: offset
params.description: Zero-based index of the first object in a response collection

items.docs: Returns the available benefit plan types configured in the tenant.
